# go-opcua Interoperability Coverage

<!-- Code generated by internal/cmd/render-interop-coverage. DO NOT EDIT. -->

Source of truth: [`capabilities.json`](capabilities.json) + [`coverage.json`](coverage.json).
Regenerate with `go generate ./interop`.

Pinned opcua-interop version: **v0.5.0**

| Status | Meaning |
|---|---|
| ✅ verified | Peer direction proven by named interop test |
| ⬜ unverified | Relevant but not yet peer-proven |
| N/A unsupported | Peer stack cannot exercise the operation |
| N/A not-applicable | Direction is nonsensical for this capability |
| Deferred | Optional profile deliberately postponed |
| Blocked | Temporary; requires linked issue |

Directions: **C→O** Go client→open62541, **C→M** Go client→Milo, **O→S** open62541→Go server, **M→S** Milo→Go server.
Go↔Go tests never earn ✅.
